features: The rich glycerine hyaluronic complex nourishes the skin, maintains its natural moisture and ensures quick skin regeneration

description: adidas Energy Kick roll-on deodorant provides 24-hour protection against odours and long-lasting freshness. With mandarin essential oil and rich glycerine and hyaluronic for fast skin regeneration.
